category_sources: source_facts.description: command-line tool for running AOT-compiled snapshots of Dart code; official dart.dev dartaotruntime docs describe running AOT snapshots.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dartaotruntime; official dart.dev tool page uses dartaotruntime as the tool name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official dart.dev dartaotruntime documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official dart-lang/sdk repository README lists dartaotruntime as part of the Dart SDK.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names AOT-compiled Dart snapshots; official dart.dev page describes dartaotruntime as a command for AOT snapshots.
